Starting in 2010, this variable included in the formulary file (rather than the PDE file). 
SHORT NAME: PRAUTHYN 
LONG NAME: PRIOR_AUTHORIZATION_YN 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
PDE and Plan Characteristics (derived) 
VALUES: 
1 = Prior authorization required 
0 = Prior authorization not required 
Null 
COMMENT: 
Part D plan sponsors submit the pricing, tiers, and formularies for their plan benefit packages to CMS 
via the Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
